chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos. 984 to 994 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No. 7, 14 & 28. 2. For order on CMA No. 464/2024 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For order on CMA No. 465/2024. (stay) 21.10.2025 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate files Vakalatnamas and states, under instructions, that references may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected files. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
